name: Angular Input Library
description: This repository contains the source code for the Angular libraries (npm publishable) '@ng-ar/md-input', '@ng-ar/svg-icon', '@ng-ar/input' and '@ng-ar/bg-svg'.

name: ss7
description: This is a ruby gem for PC77 (Point Code 77) which is a signaling point code format used in Nokia's R4 network infrastructure for SS7 (Signaling System No. 7) telecommunications networks. It represents a 14-bit point code as two 7-bit decimal numbers separated by a hyphen.

name: Nokia Snake Game
description: This is a mini game to learn about webassembly with the help of rust language. The concept is running old Nokia Snake game in web using rust.
